subject: WS1.4 test classification blocker resolved
body: Fiery WS1.4 update: resolved Rawls/test-expert blocking classification issue. Split tests into processor.unit.test.ts (pure injected-driver adapter boundary; no real jsonld/DatasetCore) and processor.integration.test.ts (real jsonld expand/compact/frame plus DatasetCore equivalence). Also kept Solar watch-point fixes: explicit object context/frame scope, minimal pinned fixture note, compact/frame invalid-output coverage. Verification green after split: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test (5 files, 39 tests); type-check; lint; build; git diff --check on claimed paths. Holding staging/commit for remaining type/assumptions review and your route.
